canonical_definition: LeanDojo is a Lean theorem-proving benchmark and data-extraction ecosystem used as a comparison point for premise-based theorem proving.
papers: Lean-STaR: Learning to Interleave Thinking and Proving

definitions.text: LeanDojo is a Lean theorem-proving benchmark and data-extraction ecosystem used as a comparison point for premise-based theorem proving.
A benchmark/dataset for evaluating language-model-based theorem provers on Lean theorem proving problems, including a novel-premises test subset.
definitions.paper: Lean-STaR: Learning to Interleave Thinking and Proving
